class.name: CelShader
class.brief_description: Post-process effect class that implements a simple posterization effect.
class.description: Post-process effect class that implements a simple posterization effect based on the amount of color levels provided in the posterization variable.
class.members: <member name="m_levels" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="16.0"> Controls how many color levels does the posterization effect use.
